status.description: The final execution status of the pipeline.

processed_files.description: List of absolute local file paths to the generated output files (e.g., feature-barcode matrices, .h5ad files, BAMs).

qc_metrics.description: Extracted quality control metrics from the pipeline execution.

visualizations.description: List of absolute local file paths to generated plots (e.g., UMAPs, spatial expression plots, QC histograms).

provenance_log.description: Absolute local path to the data provenance and execution log file.

biological_insights.description: Markdown formatted summary of biological interpretations, cell type compositions, and generated hypotheses.

error_details.description: Detailed error message if the pipeline failed or was aborted.
